title: Moscow Strikes Back
writer: Pyotr Pavlenko, Albert Maltz, Elliot Paul
actors: N. Dubravin, Edward G. Robinson, Iosif Stalin
plot: A number of frontline cameramen shot the footage used in this documentary of the Battle of Moscow, between October 1941 and January 1942,in which a people's war against the German invaders, whose atrocities are shown in graphic de...
